case_title: CARNITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. FRANK MOZEKE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 69610578) AS TO DEFENDANT MOZEKE, FRANK
